ogTitle: Kweda vs Kwinana Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kweda and Kwinana Beach.
heading: Kweda vs Kwinana Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kweda, Western Australia and Kwinana Beach, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kweda has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kwinana Beach (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kweda or Kwinana Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kweda has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Kwinana Beach scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kweda scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Kwinana Beach scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kweda or Kwinana Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kweda has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
